channel.title: Satellite Imagery on anastasiiamorozova
channel.description: Recent content in Satellite Imagery on anastasiiamorozova

item.title: Mapping Russia's War Machine on NATO's Doorstep
item.description: We used high-resolution satellite imagery to map Russian military base activity along NATO’s eastern border. GRU special forces in Kaliningrad are being trained for sabotage operations, and new nuclear weapons infrastructure is taking shape in Belarus.

item.title: ANDROMEDA: Ukrainian puzzle
item.description: We tracked the yacht Andromeda, suspected in the Nord Stream pipeline explosions, by cross-referencing satellite imagery and AIS vessel tracking data. On-ground OSINT reporting led us to a Kyiv businessman whose company had rented the boat.
